About Me
Who I Am

I'm Ahmed Refaat, a Flutter Developer based in Sammanoud, Gharbia, Egypt, graduating with a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from Misr University for Science and Technology (GPA: 3.82 — Excellent).

I specialize in crafting scalable, production-ready Flutter applications following Clean Architecture principles. My experience spans e-commerce, fintech, real estate, healthcare, and assistive technology — always with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and bilingual (Arabic/English) support.

I'm passionate about writing clean, testable code, integrating complex APIs, and delivering polished user experiences on both Android and iOS platforms.

Work Samples
Featured Projects
🏠
No Broker App
Real Estate & Engines Classifieds

A platform eliminating intermediaries in real estate and automotive markets, enabling users to directly list, browse, and manage properties and vehicles with an offline-first architecture.

  • JWT-based auth with encrypted offline storage
  • Dynamic dependent-dropdown ad creation workflows
  • 3-tier user profile state management
  • High-performance caching (Hive & Secure Storage)
  • Real-time RTL/LTR Arabic/English switching
  • Interactive maps with customizable filtering
Flutter Dio Clean Arch BLoC Hive
⌥ GitHub
🛒
Rabih E-Commerce
Full-featured Shopping App

Comprehensive cross-platform e-commerce ecosystem built with strict Clean Architecture principles, featuring real-time data synchronization and advanced error handling.

  • Paymob payment gateway (Cards & Wallets)
  • Cart with real-time price calculations
  • Dynamic categories & brand management
  • Multi-parameter search & filtering engine
  • Wishlist and detailed order history
  • Custom reusable widgets & smooth animations
Flutter REST API BLoC Clean Arch Paymob
⌥ GitHub
♿
ThinkStep
Assistive Smart Wheelchair · Graduation Project

A mobile-based assistive system enabling individuals with severe physical disabilities to control a smart wheelchair using only eye blinks via EEG brainwave detection and AI signal interpretation.

  • NeuroSky MindWave EEG headset integration
  • Custom AI for blink-to-command interpretation
  • Real-time Wi-Fi socket + Bluetooth communication
  • Patient & caregiver dual-role system
  • GPS tracking, audio/video calling (ZegoCloud)
  • Emergency alerts & medication management
Flutter AI Bluetooth Socket ZegoCloud
⌥ GitHub
💬
Social Media App
Full-featured Flutter & Firebase App

A full social platform with account creation, personal profiles, posts with images/videos, follow system, and real-time interactions via Firebase Firestore.

  • Secure login & registration system
  • Create posts with images or videos
  • Follow/unfollow users
  • Real-time likes, comments & feed updates
  • Smooth, responsive UI across all devices
Flutter Firebase Firestore Auth
⌥ GitHub

Dahab Cash App
Gold Market Transactions (Freelance)

A mobile application for managing gold market transactions, tracking live gold prices, and analyzing buy/sell activity. Contributed as a freelance developer.

  • Buy/sell operation recording
  • Full Arabic & English localization (intl package)

Work Experience
February 2025 — May 2025
Freelance Flutter Developer
Dahab Cash App · Remote, Egypt

Contributed to Dahab Cash, a mobile app for managing gold market transactions and tracking live gold prices. My primary contribution was implementing full localization, enabling the app to support both Arabic and English with proper RTL/LTR switching — improving accessibility for bilingual users across different regions. Used Flutter's localization tools and the intl package.
